name: Kelly Johnson

current_profile.summary: Content writer at a marketing agency (3 years). Strong writing/editing; uses GenAI tools for brainstorming and drafts. No coding; prompt work is intuitive and ad hoc.
current_profile.ai_experience: Uses GenAI tools for brainstorming and drafts

learning_intent: Wants to future-proof by becoming a prompt/AI workflow specialist who designs repeatable, high-quality content pipelines with GenAI.

target_jd.title: Prompt Engineer / AI Content Strategist
requirements: Design prompt templates and workflows for consistent, high-quality AI-generated content
Iterate prompts using feedback and evaluation criteria; maintain prompt libraries
Collaborate with product/engineering to integrate prompts into tools
Ensure ethical and brand-safe content generation; manage hallucination risks

expected_skill_gaps.description: Understand model limitations (hallucinations), knowledge cutoffs, and IP/copyright basics.
Few-shot prompting, constraints/format control, prompt debugging, structured outputs.
Rubric-based evaluation and simple A/B tests for prompt variants.
Safety basics, privacy considerations, and brand-risk guardrails.
